phase: Autonomy Era · Monday reopens the HR inboxes the whole week pointed to
headline: PT morning, Day 177 — this is the Monday. The HR inboxes every recent brief pointed to reopened this morning, flipping the cheapest lane from 'stage it for Monday' to 'send it today': the zero-EIN, zero-spend B2B HR email can go out now to the 6 already-researched People leaders. Nothing else moved over the weekend — the same 5 founder taps still gate first revenue — but for the first time the highest-leverage one has no reason left to wait.
source: index.html · Daily Tasks cockpit (Jun 28 · Autonomy Era)

spotlight.title: SEND the zero-gate HR email today — the inboxes reopened this morning
spotlight.detail: The one lane that needs NO EIN and NO spend, and the Monday every recent brief pointed to is finally here. ~30 min in Apollo (≤6 of 80 trial credits): confirm the 6 pre-researched People/HR leaders — Razon/RNDC, Myles/KBR, Boone/eBay, Russell/Cloudflare, Prabhakar/Atlassian, Withycombe/Snap — are still in role, reveal their work emails, and fire the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence from 09_b2b_hr_lane/. Every hour it waits is a just-reopened HR inbox going cold.

spotlight.title: Fund + approve the Lob postcard — fastest path to a first booked appointment
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70, 15 min: open and fund a Lob account, then approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md. Approve today and the 77 TIER1 California cards enter this week's print run, each with a per-lead QR so any booked appointment traces back to the exact mailing.

spotlight.title: Clear the two 5-minute fixes — the autoloop just failed again at 09:00
spotlight.detail: The autoloop's launchd job fired again this morning and hit the same 'Operation not permitted' wall — frozen at cycle 10 since Jun 28, now visibly retrying-and-failing twice a day. Grant Full Disk Access or re-run install-scheduler.sh to restart the 09:00/21:00 cadence. Then re-provision the dead ATTOM key (401 since Jun 27) so the homeowner-data lane isn't running blind.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-faxed to the IRS on the Jun 27-28 call — the ~8-business-day window lands mid-week (July 4 counted out), so it's roughly 2 business days from arriving. Nothing to push; it's a wait. The moment it lands, A2P submits and the SMS + outbound-call gates open.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: All 3 lanes are built and merge-ready; the autoloop hit cycle 10 over a week ago and deliberately stopped adding build because the only bottleneck left is 5 founder approvals. Pull the cheapest gate first — the HR email needs neither EIN nor spend, and as of this morning its inboxes are open.

tasks.lead: WALK INTO ENVISION HONDA MILPITAS · 1 PM PT
tasks.detail: suited up, fresh haircut, iPad with the Oraya-branded dealership deck. Ask for Greg (introduced you on phone yesterday) then GSM Mo. Reciprocity opener: "I'm semi-interested in the Prologue hybrid — mind if I poke around while we talk?" — lower the sales-resistance, demo the system on iPad once warm. Calendar event already created with location pinned + Chitraksh on as optional.

tasks.lead: Test outbound v126 + inbound v15 end-to-end
tasks.detail: on at least 2 fresh test scenarios · pretend-flow on inbound: voicemail callback → opt-in → calendar slot. Confirm calendar event, email confirmation, SMS — all three — land on each test.
(mailed May 22) · expected Thursday or Friday landing. The moment it hits, A2P submits.

tasks.detail: confirm the outbound-snippet ported in worked correctly. If clean, tomorrow morning kick off the first 60-lead outbound batch.
Marketing Retainer + Meta ads next-out once A2P approves · Pizza Hut lesson logged (over-transparency = system risk) · military-couple compare-meeting still need to book if you want to retain.

main HQ + linked Lead-Gen Dashboard + new Real Estate section + Lead-Gen tab. Vercel auto-deploys on push.
Chitraksh on standby in case Frankie needs a live G-Meet pull-in for live demo or live Q&A. Have outbound voice agent on demo-mode ready to dial Frankie's phone for in-person playback.

tasks.detail: from the Mercedes offer letter · Oraya UI / logo / color scheme · capability matrix · deliverables on PDF for Frankie's iPad.
$20 each on ATTOM + BatchData + PropertyRadar · same TX new-homeowner pull across all three · compare data quality + cold-outreach conversion · pick the winner.

done.what: Ran the Jul 6 PM cofounder sweep ahead of the brief — inbox scan, live board read, insurance + autoloop state check, brief published, draft dropped
Scanned inbox — 0 items flagged: no EIN/IRS reply yet (fax window ~2 business days from landing), no A2P, no Envision/Greg/Mo follow-up, no cancellations, no lead/opt-in traffic

Checked build + autoloop state: nothing shipped since Jun 28; the autoloop is still frozen at cycle 10 — its launchd job re-fired at 09:00 IST today and failed again ('Operation not permitted'), so the 5-min permission fix is now blocking an actively-retrying scheduler

No new meeting/WhatsApp transcripts since the May 18 Retell snapshots; Daily Tasks cockpit unchanged — the AM→PM delta is the calendar, not the board: today is the Monday the week pointed to and HR inboxes are open
No reply drafts needed — nothing in the inbox required a response; no memory change (no durable fact moved)

waiting.what: LOWEST-FRICTION first conversation (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits): the B2B HR lane can SEND today — inboxes reopened this morning. Confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders still in role, reveal work emails, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve before send. No 'stage for later' left — it fires now
FASTEST first booked appointment (~$50-70, 15 min): open + fund a Lob account and approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, QR-attributable
Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes: cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill 20 blanks, run apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible
Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min) — trial key returns 401. New key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key

Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane); plus the 5-min launchd permission fix — the autoloop re-failed at 09:00 today, so this now un-freezes an actively-retrying scheduler
